seed_pages.content:
---
title: Quartzbloom Systems
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Halcyon Quillfeather.
---

Quartzbloom Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Halcyon Quillfeather. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Halcyon Quillfeather
type: person
aliases: [halcyon]
summary: Founder of Quartzbloom Systems.
---

Halcyon Quillfeather is the founder of Quartzbloom Systems. Halcyon flagged churn as the top risk in the latest update.

turns.text: Partner meeting wrapped on the Quartzbloom Systems round.
We decided to pass on the Quartzbloom Systems round. Pricing is too rich at this stage. Logging it now.
